perks: [العربية\\
Apply for your new card by 15 May 2026.
Spend  10,000 to receive a  1,000 Amazon Gift Card or  5,000 to receive a  500 Amazon Gift Card within 30 days of when your card is issued.

Cashback will be processed in equivalent FAB Rewards, redeemable instantly on the FAB Mobile app.
